events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The smell of the victory cigars wafted down the tunnel beneath Arrowhead Stadium, straight from the Las Vegas Raiders in the celebratory visiting locker room to the despondent home locker room of the Kansas City Chiefs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raiders stun sloppy Chiefs with 2 defensive TDs in 20-14 victory on Christmas Day

events.name: New York Giants at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — Yes, of course, Jalen Hurts and coach Nick Sirianni heard the booming chants that echoed throughout the Linc from Eagles fans fed up with the pass-heavy offense that stalled in the second half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eagles end 3-game skid, maintain control of NFC East title hopes with 33-25 win over Giants

headlines.description: — If the rare late-season matchup between the top teams in the NFL was a statement game, Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens delivered a loud one to the rest of the league.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lamar Jackson leads the Ravens past the 49ers 33-19 in a showdown of the top 2 teams
